name: Roadmap Burn Down Wave 4 - LLM Request Contract
outcome_goal: Make provider/model routing and request shape deterministic, inspectable, and promotion-safe.

jobs.label: provider_capability_matrix_verify
jobs.prompt: Finish or verify the provider capability matrix authority behind the effective provider/job catalog. Use BUG-EBE27625 and related provider catalog items if available. The outcome should be queryable route capability truth, not another helper that recomputes policy privately.

jobs.label: task_assembler_policy_route
jobs.prompt: Remove hardcoded provider/model request paths in task assembler and route through policy-backed task_type_routing. Start from BUG-F09C561A and BUG-60623452 if present. Respect the OpenRouter primary chat decision and Anthropic CLI-only decision. Add tests that prove route selection comes from recorded authority.

jobs.label: provider_freshness_preproof_gate
jobs.prompt: Encode provider freshness as a pre-proof launch gate instead of a stale projection warning. Use BUG-72420B56 if available. The gate should fail closed with actionable remediation when freshness cannot be proven. Add focused tests around launch/firecheck behavior.

jobs.label: task_route_request_shape
jobs.prompt: Tighten request-shape authority for task routes: reasoning control, max tokens, structured output, cache policy, and streaming policy should be explicit route data with receipts. Make the smallest useful improvement and include tests or operator-query proof.
